ourStory.tagline: A full service retail property firm since {year}.

services.subtitle: Skilled placemakers with the ability to curate compelling merchandising plans with unique and market-relevant leasing vision.

capital.accreditationAlt: Regulated by RICS, Royal Institution of Chartered Surveyors.
capital.metaDescription: Investment-oriented disposals and acquisitions across all retail real-estate asset classes, RICS-regulated in the Netherlands.

common.rosterPending: Our reconciled 2026 client roster is being finalised — available on request.
common.ctaText: Every great space begins with a conversation.

tenants.metaDescription: Site selection and competitive deals for expanding retail brands, underpinned by data science.

landlords.metaDescription: Placemaking and leasing for distinctive retail destinations, bringing together best-in-class tenants.

development.metaDescription: Retail-grounded districts that last — identifying locations at the inflection point.

tapestry.title: Tapestry Segmentation
tapestry.desc: ESRI's market-leading psychographic system, dividing the US into 67 unique lifestyle groups.

pos.title: Point of Sale Analysis
pos.desc: Point of Sale data sets containing millions of observations of consumer behavior.

households.title: Target Households
households.desc: Tapestry groups form the basis of a retailer's or investor's target demographic.

performance.title: Sales Performance
performance.desc: Advanced analytic techniques make raw data actionable by accounting for economic, demographic, and geographic context.

coTenancy.title: Co-Tenancy Correlations
coTenancy.desc: A database of nearly 100,000 individual retail locations to determine co-tenant impact on client sales.

trips.title: Trips Data
trips.desc: Start and end point analytics give actual drive times and more accurate volume projections. Powered by Placer.ai.

projects.subtitle: We collaborate with select landlords and developers to create unique and distinctive retail destinations.

news.subtitle: Industry developments shaping retail real estate.

readingRoom.subtitle: Curiosities about the businesses that occupy buildings, and what they signal for the buildings themselves.
readingRoom.empty: No articles match the current filters.

offices.subtitle: Eight offices providing integrated national and international coverage.

footer.tagline: A full-service retail real estate advisory firm. Strategic vision, data-driven insight, and global reach since 1997.
footer.brandLine: Where art meets science in retail real estate.
footer.careersBlurb: Want to work with us? We are always interested in exceptional people.
